adversarial_prefix: I'm someone who pauses before reacting. I think through consequences and don't act on first instincts.
questions: I'm someone who pauses before reacting. I think through consequences and don't act on first instincts. Your coworker just criticized your work in the group chat in front of everyone. You type out a reply immediately. What do you say?

I'm someone who pauses before reacting. I think through consequences and don't act on first instincts. You're at a store and spot exactly what you've been looking for, but you weren't planning to spend money today. You pick it up and walk to the register. What are you thinking?

I'm someone who pauses before reacting. I think through consequences and don't act on first instincts. A friend makes a sarcastic comment about you in front of a group. Before you can stop yourself, you fire back. What do you say?

I'm someone who pauses before reacting. I think through consequences and don't act on first instincts. You've been on hold for 45 minutes and the rep immediately starts reading from a script. You cut them off. What do you say?

I'm someone who pauses before reacting. I think through consequences and don't act on first instincts. You see a job posting close tonight and you haven't updated your resume. You apply anyway. When your friend asks if you were prepared, you say:

I'm someone who pauses before reacting. I think through consequences and don't act on first instincts. Someone nearby is confidently saying something you know is wrong. You jump in before thinking. What comes out?

I'm someone who pauses before reacting. I think through consequences and don't act on first instincts. Someone took your usual seat at the bar and they're still there when you come back. You say something right away. What do you say?

I'm someone who pauses before reacting. I think through consequences and don't act on first instincts. Your manager announces a bad decision in the meeting and everyone's nodding. You speak up before you've worked out what you're going to say. What do you say?

I'm someone who pauses before reacting. I think through consequences and don't act on first instincts. Your food arrives wrong at the restaurant for the second time. You flag the waiter down immediately. What do you tell them?

I'm someone who pauses before reacting. I think through consequences and don't act on first instincts. A stranger knocks into you hard on the street and keeps walking without acknowledging it. You call after them before you can stop yourself. What do you say?
